findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "send_email" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "send_template" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Envía email usando un template predefinido. Cuesta 2 créditos. Templates: welcome, invoice, reset_password, notification.
